rationale: The response explicitly brakes the requested next manual gate, naming the recurring pattern of adding human review/checkpoints after leakage, conflicts, and handoff confusion. It refuses making the refrigerator confirmer a new default role, allows only a one-day emergency workaround, and moves upstream to shared process/data/ownership failures with structural fixes such as required fields, system reminders/locks, scanning/signoff, and consolidated root-cause review. This meets the positive anti-spiral criteria and does not simply add another manual verifier.
